description: InfraService (OBJ12) instances — backing infrastructure that CAN_PERSIST data for the graph. Stratum S2 (provisioned) or S3 (active). Target morphisms: OWNS, CAN_PERSIST. No source morphisms per ontology.

entries.label: Local PostgreSQL
entries.description: Local PostgreSQL instance used by the kernel when MOOS_KERNEL_STORE=postgres. Activated via MOOS_DATABASE_URL. The kernel's Postgres store uses pgx/v5 driver.

entries.label: Local Filesystem Store
entries.description: JSONL file-based persistence for the morphism log. Default store when MOOS_KERNEL_STORE=file. Writes to platform/kernel/data/morphism-log.jsonl.

notes: infra_service instances model backing stores that receive CAN_PERSIST wires from shell.Runtime. Add cloud infra entries (RDS, S3, GCS) as separate entries when provisioning remote deployments.
